description_long: This is a baseball cap featuring a bold red base color overlaid with a striking black grid pattern that covers the entire surface. The cap has a structured, rounded crown and a prominent, flat bill extending forward, typical of classic baseball cap designs. The grid pattern is consistent across the crown and bill, creating a visually dynamic, almost geometric appearance. The top of the crown is finished with a small, circular button in a contrasting gray color. The sides and back of the cap are seamless, with no visible adjustment strap or fastener. The overall look is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban streetwear or casual outdoor use.
description: A red baseball cap with a bold black grid pattern and a flat bill, featuring a small gray button on top. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat bill extending to the right and the full grid pattern across the crown and bill.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical grid pattern on the crown and the bill's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the bill extending left, mirroring the grid pattern seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and the continuation of the grid pattern, with no visible adjustment strap.
